value.value: Translation Error: Timezone keyword is only valid in 1.3 or lower
Translation Error: Syntax error at Z
Wrong output: Duration in hours between T06 and T07:00:00 should be Uncertainty[0, 1]
Spec says to convert more precise duration to most precise unit in Date. How do you convert seconds to months? 31535999 is 364.999 days, which isn't quite 12 months, so we answer 2015-06.
